content:
alternate title: **so you want to make an Awakener OC, now what?**

Niko is back again with another lore piece! This time, I tried to emulate Mythag's style of documentation with writing this, so it should be safe from actual plot twist spoilers this time (though with some spoilers still)

This doc should cover everything about Awakeners, from how their made, what (mostly) determines realms, and even their rights in Mythag.

As usual, feel free to discuss and debate anything that I might have misinterpreted or missed. And hopefully this will help someone with their oc ideas

May the Silver Key Guide Us.

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1U7ThUxYydZKGpV9IKgucegYNPxjxGp6g7YtfzWuQWbE/edit?usp=sharing

Special thanks to <@702167871144591461> and <@191643200950239232> for cross checking and proofreading the initial draft

embeds.title: Awakeners 101
embeds.description: Awakeners 101 An in-character study by NikoSpecial thanks to _venush and jadlithon for proofreading  This document aims to explain all that we currently know about Awakeners, Realms, and other related topics. But this isn’t a history lesson. Thanks to Mythag’s extensive history of working with A...

content: You sort've touched on it in the Genesis section, but for OC purposes it might be worth mentioning that the higher wills can often exert a lot of influence on how the Awakener's body/design changes during awakening (or can even 'talk' to them, ala one of Doll's voice lines)
